Validate inputs for a specific model

Source: R/model_compatibility.R
validate_model_inputs.Rd

Checks that all required predictors are provided and warns about unused ones.

Usage

validate_model_inputs(
  model_name,
  d2h_wax,
  longitude,
  latitude,
  elevation = NULL,
  c4_percent = NULL,
  pft_tree = NULL,
  pft_shrub = NULL,
  pft_grass = NULL,
  verbose = TRUE
)

Arguments

model_name

Name of the model

d2h_wax

Leaf wax d2H values

longitude

Longitude values

latitude

Latitude values

elevation

Elevation values (optional)

c4_percent

C4 percentage values (optional)

pft_tree

Tree PFT fraction (optional)

pft_shrub

Shrub PFT fraction (optional)

pft_grass

Grass PFT fraction (optional)

verbose

Whether to print validation messages

Value

List with validation results
